notes:
vMLX 1.5.61

Highlights:
- MiniMax-M3 reasoning fix: engine-side thinking-budget backstop bounds runaway reasoning loops (scales to max_tokens so it always fires before the output limit).
- Reasoning on/off/auto modes work across chat completions, responses API, and gateway.
- MiniMax-M3 VL reasoning kwarg fix (thinking_mode).

Verification:
- Notarized + stapled arm64 DMG; Gatekeeper accepted; bundled vmlx_engine 1.5.61.
- Reasoning fix proven LIVE in the dev-build UI (multi-turn, coherent, no loop; backstop fired).
